title: lobelia iteophylla
intro: Lobelia iteophylla, also known as Chinese Lobelia, is a plant species in the Lobelia genus, native to China and other parts of Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and expectorant properties, which help to relieve respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The health benefits of Lobelia iteophylla include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, improve sleep quality, and boost the immune system. Lobelia iteophylla can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
